data.body: Done definition update: Specify FILE_IMPACT conflict-resolution semantics in ticket-reducer.py — apply latest-wins: the last FILE_IMPACT event by timestamp replaces the compiled file_impact array entirely; earlier events are discarded. Document this in reducer comments and in ticket-system-v3-architecture.md (via docs story 4610-cb5e). This semantic must be fixed before stories 54ee-c932 (migration) and 2998-a1ba (consumer refactors) so those stories can reason about output correctness. [adversarial-review, blue-team accepted]
